conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connection with F, as we bonded deeply over our families and made a firm commitment to look out for each other and stick to a fair split. I also felt very aligned with A and C, with whom I discussed specific strategies for cooperation and agreed to share information about the other players. Although my talk with J was pleasant, it felt the least connected because we didn't establish much of a tactical plan beyond general well-wishes and basic pleasantries.

I made explicit agreements with F to pursue a fair split and with A and B to act as allies and look out for one another. I feel a high level of trust in F due to our shared motivations, but I am staying alert and haven't fully extended my trust to the rest of the group until I see their actions once the money is on the line.
